rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports.
Use implementation scopes for bindings that depend on subcomponents or connections.
generic_rules: Ensure all AGREE identifiers are declared or visible in the AADL model.
Do not introduce package-qualified names not present in the analyzed model.
Place input range assumptions and output guarantees in component type annexes when bounds are explicitly stated.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference visible ports and features from the AADL model.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes unless they are valid in that scope.
Do not assume numeric bounds for ports unless explicitly stated in the requirement.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of AADL structure
